chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1111 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Bharat Kumar Suthar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel. = Today, the officials respondents have filed their parawise comments and according to which no criminal case is pending amongst the petitioner and private respondents. The main grievance of the petitioner is that respondent No.3-SHO P.S Islamkot at the behest of private respondents No.4 to 10 is causing harassment to the petitioner and the private respondents are trying to dispossess him from the land in question. The respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and respondent No.3, who is a police officer, will conduct himself strictly in accordance with law and discharge his duties in a fair and reasonable manner and not at the directions of some other individual. However, it is clarified that the private respondents, if have any genuine grievances against the petitioner, the same can be redressed by due process of law and not otherwise. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of but with a note of caution that violation of this order can entail Contempt of Court proceedings. JUDGE Shahid
